properties.description: Daily ELT orchestration: extract -> ADLS -> COPY INTO Bronze -> dbt Silver -> dbt Gold -> dbt test. The COPY INTO step runs natively via the Snowflake linked service; extract + dbt steps call an ELT-runner HTTP endpoint (see azure/adf/README.md for how to host it).

activities.name: extract_and_upload
activities.description: Run the Python extractors for the date, then upload JSON to ADLS Gen2 (extractors.run_all --upload).

activities.name: snowflake_copy_into
activities.description: Load the staged ADLS JSON into the 5 Bronze tables via COPY INTO. Runs natively through the Snowflake linked service (LOADER role). METADATA$FILENAME populates _file_name.

scripts.text: COPY INTO MACROMARKET.BRONZE.raw_stock_prices (raw_data, _file_name) FROM (SELECT $1, METADATA$FILENAME FROM @MACROMARKET.BRONZE.adls_raw_stage/stock-prices/) FILE_FORMAT = (FORMAT_NAME = MACROMARKET.BRONZE.json_format) ON_ERROR = 'ABORT_STATEMENT';

COPY INTO MACROMARKET.BRONZE.raw_stock_fundamentals (raw_data, _file_name) FROM (SELECT $1, METADATA$FILENAME FROM @MACROMARKET.BRONZE.adls_raw_stage/stock-fundamentals/) FILE_FORMAT = (FORMAT_NAME = MACROMARKET.BRONZE.json_format) ON_ERROR = 'ABORT_STATEMENT';

COPY INTO MACROMARKET.BRONZE.raw_fred_series (raw_data, _file_name) FROM (SELECT $1, METADATA$FILENAME FROM @MACROMARKET.BRONZE.adls_raw_stage/fred-series/) FILE_FORMAT = (FORMAT_NAME = MACROMARKET.BRONZE.json_format) ON_ERROR = 'ABORT_STATEMENT';

COPY INTO MACROMARKET.BRONZE.raw_crypto_prices (raw_data, _file_name) FROM (SELECT $1, METADATA$FILENAME FROM @MACROMARKET.BRONZE.adls_raw_stage/crypto-prices/) FILE_FORMAT = (FORMAT_NAME = MACROMARKET.BRONZE.json_format) ON_ERROR = 'ABORT_STATEMENT';

COPY INTO MACROMARKET.BRONZE.raw_fear_greed (raw_data, _file_name) FROM (SELECT $1, METADATA$FILENAME FROM @MACROMARKET.BRONZE.adls_raw_stage/fear-greed/) FILE_FORMAT = (FORMAT_NAME = MACROMARKET.BRONZE.json_format) ON_ERROR = 'ABORT_STATEMENT';

activities.name: dbt_run_staging
activities.description: dbt run --select staging (Bronze -> Silver staging views).

activities.name: dbt_run_gold
activities.description: dbt run --select gold (dims + facts, incl. incremental snapshot + Python correlation model).

activities.name: dbt_test
activities.description: dbt test — runs all schema + singular tests; fails the pipeline on data-quality violations.

activities.name: notify_failure
activities.description: On failure of the final step, post an alert (Slack/Teams webhook). For full coverage, add failure links from each step or wrap in a parent Try/Catch pipeline.

body.text: @concat('MacroMarket daily ELT FAILED for ', pipeline().parameters.pipeline_date, ' (run ', pipeline().RunId, ')')
